zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.於1404年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre30歲，母親Lady Margaret Gordon25歲。他於1434年與Janet Fraser在英國蘇格蘭莫雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1464年在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾福利斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.于1404年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre30岁，母亲Lady Margaret Gordon25岁。他于1434年与Janet Fraser在英国苏格兰莫雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1464年在苏格兰艾爾金爾福利斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cumming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

variants.name: Cowman
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Cumming  .

variants.name: Coman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Vasile, Cornel, Mihaela, Nicolae, Sorin, Viorel.
Irish (Tipperary and Waterford): shortened form of Mac Cuimín or Ó Cuimín, see Cumming .

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Common
meanings: nickname from Middle English comen, Old English cuman ‘guest, stranger, newcomer’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. was born in 1404, in Elginshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret Gordon, was 25. He married Janet Fraser in 1434, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1464, in Forres, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. est né en 1404, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Gordon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Janet Fraser en 1434, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1464, à Forres, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. 1404 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre 30 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Gordon 25. Er hat 1434 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom Janet Fraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1464 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Forres, Elginshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. è nato il nel 1404 nel Elginshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Gordon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Janet Fraser nel 1434, nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1464, nel Forres, Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.が1404年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyreは30歳，母Lady Margaret Gordonは25歳であった。1434年にイギリススコットランドモーアイでJanet Fraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1464年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアフォーレスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.(이)가 1404년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Gordon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1434년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 Janet Fraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1464년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 포러스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. nasceu em 1404, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Gordon, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Fraser em 1434, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1464, em Forres, Elginshire, Scotland, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. родился в 1404 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Gordon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Fraser в 1434 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1464 г. в местности форресь, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. nació en 1404, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Gordon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Janet Fraser en 1434, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1464, en Forres, Elginshire, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años.
